name: xebench
description: Cross-engine on-device LLM benchmark harness (llama.cpp vs ExecuTorch)

_notes.newArchitecture: react-native-executorch REQUIRES New Architecture. Set newArchEnabled=true in android/gradle.properties.
_notes.buildTask: This package.json is the entry point; android/ project + MainApplication registration of BenchProbePackage is the remaining scaffold. See README.md 'Status'.
_notes.versionsAreLoadBearing: llama.rn and react-native-executorch versions are stamped onto every result row — bump deliberately, not incidentally.
